title: taraxacum irroratum
intro: Taraxacum irroratum, also known as the dappled dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is commonly found in Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, and is also believed to have hepatoprotective and immunomodulatory effects. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum irroratum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues and promote overall well-being.
